creator: jason@aventia.pw
text:
Libfmt is required by Mariadb1011-server https://www.freshports.org/databases/mariadb1011-server/

If Rspamd does not want to be built against libfmt why does it build against it  when libfmt is present?

This seems to defeat the reason why they are called ports in the first place, 3rd party software ported to work in FreeBSD.
